subject: [PATCH v5 01/21] nfsd: check fl_lmops in nfsd_breaker_owns_lease()

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch modifies the nfsd_breaker_owns_lease() function to quickly check if a lease is an nfsd-managed lease by verifying that its fl_lmops field matches the nfsd_lease_mng_ops structure. If it does, the function returns true without further checks. This optimization improves performance by reducing unnecessary computations for nfsd leases.
